# viettelidc_ovpc_network_interface (Data Source)

Look up a single ViettelIDC NIC by id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) NIC ID (vttNetworkInterfaceId).

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `description` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `ip_assign_type` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)
